subcodes.first_line: O Pride of the Realm of Mystery! Thy movement towards Tehran was indeed most propitious, causing joy and rapture among the friends [3.5s]... ...It is incumbent upon the youth to walk in the footsteps of Hakim and to be trained in his ways, for such important souls as he and his like have now ascended to the Kingdom of Abha
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طراز اقلیم راز حرکت آنجناب بسمت طهران بسیار موافق بود سبب شور و وله یاران
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
